title: JAOPCA Extras
description: Mod to add various modules to JAOPCA
body:
JAOPCA Extras is a mod to add various modules to [JAOPCA](https://modrinth.com/mod/jaopca).  
A module (see below) for each material will be added by JAOPCA.  

Modules
-------
The following modules are currently in place.  

Vanilla
------------------
* Plates
* Rods
* Gears

AE2
------------------
* Processors
* Circuits

Configs
-------
It is generated in `config/jaopca/modules/`.  
- extras\_gears.toml  
- extras\_plates.toml  
- extras\_rods.toml  
- extras\_ae2.toml (if AE2 is loaded)  

ModPacks
--------
**Feel free to use it.**  
If you want to change the name of each item added by JAOPCA, please refer [here](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/JAOPCAExtras/blob/v1.1.1/README.md#ModPacks "README.md").

Support
-------
Bug reports and requests for new features are welcome on [Github](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/JAOPCAExtras/issues "JAOPCA Extras Issue").
